description: 5. Get the reputation of an IP address
name: ip

outputs.description: Bad IP address found. IP.Malicious.Vendor For malicious IPs, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IPs, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
